tax.summary: You can check the status of your shipment one to two hours after receiving the email by using the link provided.Shipped with DHL: Check status of parcel PACKAGINGMytheresa's eco packagingThe eco packaging is made from at least 84% recycled materials and is about two times lighter than our yellow boxes, reducing consumption, waste, and the carbon footprint of each order.CompositionDisposal recommendationsCorrugated cardboard (PAP 20)- Reduce the volume of the box for disposal- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedMytheresa's signature yellow packagingThe signature yellow packaging is FSC Mix certified (made with materials from FSC-certified forests and recycled materials).CompositionDisposal recommendationsGreyboard (PAP 21)- Please remove the detachable ribbon and follow the black ribbon disposal recommendationsYellow paper (PAP 22)- Reduce the volume of the box for disposalTencel ribbon (TEX 62)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedMytheresa's envelope and thank-you card The envelope and thank-you card are FSC Mix certified (made with materials from FSC-certified forests and recycled materials).CompositionDisposal recommendationsPaper (PAP 22)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedInvoice and returns & exchange formBoth documents are either FSC Mix or 70% PEFC certified (made with materials from FSC-certified forests and recycled materials or with materials from PEFC-certified forests).CompositionDisposal recommendationsPaper (PAP 22)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedProtection paperCompositionDisposal recommendationsTissue paper (PAP 22)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedMytheresa sticker CompositionDisposal recommendationsPaper (PAP 22)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedMytheresa tagCompositionDisposal recommendationsPaper with a plastic lamination (PAP 22) or paper (PAP 22)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how paper waste is collectedBlack ribbon CompositionDisposal recommendationsTencel (TEX 62)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how textile waste is collectedTape CompositionDisposal recommendationsPolypropylen (PP 5)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how plastic waste is collectedStaple threadCompositionDisposal recommendationsNylon (PA 6.6)- Please follow your local municipal guidelines on how plastic waste is collectedDuties & TaxesCustoms duties and taxes for JapanFor deliveries to Japan, the Japanese sales tax (VAT) as well as customs duties and handling fees are included in the price of the item.If you have any questions, please contact our Customer Care team at: customercare@mytheresa.com.EMAIL UScustomercare@mytheresa.comDue to a high amount of requests, we might take a few days to get back to you.
